content.cn_text: 大家好，欢迎来到健康听力医学诊所和外科的主页，在这里我们想分享更多关于我们提供的服务的信息。
content.en_text: Hello, and welcome to the home page for the Healthy Hearing Medical Clinic and Surgery,where we'd like to share a little more information about the services we provide and more.

content.cn_text: 我们的医院是英国领先的专科医院之一，吸引了来自世界各地最优秀的医疗专业人员。
content.en_text: Our hospital is one of the leading specialised hospitals in the United Kingdom, attracting the very best healthcare professionals from around the globe.

content.cn_text: 我们不仅是一家领先的医疗机构，也是英国唯一一家专注于
content.en_text: Not only are we a leading medical practice, but we are also the only hospital in the United Kingdom dedicated

content.cn_text: 完全致力于听力损失的治疗和治疗研究。
content.en_text: entirely to the treatment of, and research into the curing of hearing loss.

content.cn_text: 我们这里的设施和员工在欧洲享有盛名，每年吸引数千名患者。
content.en_text: Our facilities and staff here are renowned across Europe, attracting thousands of patients a year.

content.cn_text: 问题11:我们每年的会诊人数最多可达11,000名患者，但我们的目标是每年治疗约5,000名患者，以保持和确保我们的服务质量。
content.en_text: Our consultations can number anything up to 11,000 patients a year, however we aim to treat around 5,000 patients a year so as to maintain and ensure the quality of our services.

content.cn_text: 我们的病人保证得到最高标准的护理，以及使用我们一流的设施。
content.en_text: Our patients are guaranteed the highest standard of care, as well as the use of our first class facilities.

content.cn_text: 所有需要过夜治疗的病人都有自己的私人房间，配有配套设施，以及一个最先进的娱乐中心，包括平板液晶电视和游戏机。
content.en_text: All patients requiring overnight treatment are provided with their own private room with en-suite facilities, as well as a state-of-the-art entertainment centre,which includes a flat screen LCD television and Playstation.

content.cn_text: .我们的医疗保健专业人员可以在一周内的任何时间预约，女医生在上午8点到11点之间有空。
content.en_text: Appointments with our healthcare professionals can be made at any time during the week, with female doctors available between 8 am and 11 am.

content.cn_text: 如果您需要在这些时间以外看医生，请访问我们网站的“非工作时间”页面获取更多信息。
content.en_text: If you need to see a doctor outside of these times, please visit the 'Out of Hours' page of our website for more information.

content.cn_text: 我们的医生都接受过非常高的标准培训，并从事大量的专业工作:罗伯特先生是一名完全合格的耳喉专家，爱德华兹先生是一名儿科听力专家，而格林先生则是一名逆转听力损失的专家。
content.en_text: Our doctors are all trained to an exceptionally high standard, and practice a vast array of specialties: Mr. Robert is a fully qualified ear and throat specialist, Mr.Edwards is a pediatric hearing specialist, while Mr. Green specialises in reversing hearing loss.

content.cn_text: 欲了解更多关于我们员工的信息，请访问我们网站的“员工”页面。
content.en_text: For more details about our people, please visit the 'Staff Members' page on our website.

content.cn_text: 在会诊期间，医生有时会决定是否需要药物治疗，病人应该得到处方。
content.en_text: During a consultation, doctors will sometimes decide medication is required, for which patients should receive a prescription.

content.cn_text: 市内有几家药房，但我们建议患者使用我们医疗机构内的药房。
content.en_text: There are several pharmacies within the city; however we recommend that patients use the pharmacy housed within our health care facility.

content.cn_text: 我们的内部药房在任何时候都有充足的库存，我们的产品价格具有竞争力，我们的药剂师随时为您提供帮助和建议，从周一到周六早上8点到晚上10点，周日从早上9点到下午12点。
content.en_text: Our in-house pharmacy is well-stocked at all times, our products are competitively priced, and our pharmacists are on hand to help and advise from 8 am until 10 pm from Monday to Saturday, and from 9 am until 12 pm on Sundays.

content.cn_text: 如果您在这些时间之外需要任何帮助，请参阅我们网站上的“非工作时间”页面。
content.en_text: If you require any help outside of these hours, please see our 'Out of Hours' page on the website.

content.cn_text: 由于健康听力医学诊所和外科也是一所教学医院，我们的目标是为我们的学生提供每一个机会，让他们在实践中接触医学。
content.en_text: Since the Healthy Hearing Medical Clinic and Surgery also functions as a teaching hospital, we aim to provide our students with every opportunity to expose themselves to medicine in practice.

content.cn_text: 因此，我们鼓励我们的患者同意医学生参加他们的咨询。
content.en_text: Therefore we would like to encourage our patients to give their consent for a medical student to attend their consultations.

content.cn_text: 如果我们的病人对此感到不舒服，接待处会有一张表格，病人可以选择退出。
content.en_text: If our patients are not comfortable with this, there will be a form at reception where patients will be able to opt out.

content.cn_text: 现在，请看我给你的听力健康诊所和外科的地图。
content.en_text: Now, please look at the map I've given you of the Healthy Hearing Medical Clinic and Surgery.

content.cn_text: 对于那些不熟悉我们的做法，接待处可以通过走廊尽头的大门找到。
content.en_text: For those not familiar with our practice, reception can be found through the main door at the end of the corridor.

content.cn_text: 如果你的会诊预约了格林先生，你需要穿过正门，在护士台向右拐，他的办公室就在走廊尽头，在你左手边。
content.en_text: If your consultation is booked with Mr. Green, you need to go through the main door and turn right by the nurses' desk, and his office is at the end of the corridor on your left-hand side.

content.cn_text: 如果您需要更改您的任何个人信息，请访问我们的医疗记录办公室秘书，该办公室位于治疗室旁边。
content.en_text: If you need to alter any of your personal details, please visit our secretary at the Office for Medical Records, which you will find next to the therapy room.

content.cn_text: 如果您正在等待手术，请先在前台登记，然后在您进入诊所后从右侧的第一个门走。
content.en_text: If you're awaiting surgery, please first check in with reception, before taking the first door on the right after you enter the clinic.

content.cn_text: 最后，如果您对我们提供的任何服务感到失望，或有任何
content.en_text: Finally, in the event that you feel disappointed with any of the services we have provided, or have any

content.cn_text: 进一步的问题，请找到我们的经理办公室，它可以在医疗记录办公室附近和两个壁橱之间找到。
content.en_text: further questions, please locate our Manager's Office, which can be found near the Office for Medical Records and between two closets.

content.cn_text: 如果您对健康听力诊所和手术有任何疑问，请拨打01256 111 111与我们联系。
content.en_text: If you have any more questions about the Healthy Hearing Medical Clinic and Surgery,please do not hesitate to contact us on 01256 111 111.

groups.desc:
Questions 11-15
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: How many patients does the hospital consult every year?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，医院每年的咨询量可能高达11,000名患者，因此，正确答案是11,000，即选项C。

items.title: When can patients meet the female doctor?
items.analysis: 正确答案是A "on weekday mornings"，因为原文明确指出女性医生在上午8点到11点之间可以就诊。这个时间段正好对应于工作日的上午，符合"weekday mornings"的描述。原文没有限定具体是哪几天，而是说可以在一周内的任何时间预约，因此我们可以推断这个时间安排适用于所有工作日。

items.title: Who is the expert on treating hearing loss?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出Mr. Green专门从事"reversing hearing loss"（逆转听力损失），这与题目中询问的"treating hearing loss"（治疗听力损失）在语境中是同义的。"specialises in"这一表达进一步强调了Mr. Green在这一领域的专业性，因此Mr. Green是最符合题目要求的专家。

items.title: Where are patients recommended to buy their medicine?
items.analysis: 文中明确指出医院推荐患者使用他们自己的药房。虽然提到城市里有其他药房，但随后使用了转折词"however"，强调了医院内部药房的优势，如库存充足、价格具有竞争力、药剂师可提供帮助和建议。因此，正确答案是医疗机构自己的药房。

items.title: What will the patients be asked about whether they are willing to do?

options.title: A
options.content: Letting one student attend the consultation

options.title: B
options.content: Asking postgraduate students to do treatment

items.analysis: 文中明确表示医院希望鼓励患者同意让医学生参加他们的诊疗咨询。这直接对应了选项A的内容"让一名学生参加咨询"。题干中询问患者是否愿意做什么，而原文中使用"give their consent"（给予他们的同意）表达了这一意思，因此A选项是正确答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 16-20
Label the map below.
Write the correct letter, A-H, next to questions 16-20.

items.title: Reception
items.analysis: 根据听力原文，Mr. Green的办公室位置描述如下：通过主门（main door），在护士站（Nurses' Desk）右转，走廊尽头的左手边。在地图上，Nurses' Desk位于地图的中上方。根据描述，右转后走廊尽头的左手边是F位置。因此，正确答案是F。

items.title: Mr. Green's Room
items.analysis: 根据听力原文，经理办公室（Manager's Office）位于两个壁橱（closets）之间，而地图上唯一符合这个描述的位置是H。

items.title: Medical Records Office
items.analysis: 正确答案是B，因为听力原文明确提到医疗记录办公室（Office for Medical Records）就在治疗室（therapy room）旁边。而在地图上，B选项紧挨着治疗室，符合描述。

items.title: Surgery Room
items.analysis: 听力原文提到：“请找到我们的经理办公室，它位于医疗记录办公室附近，在两个储物柜之间。” 在地图上，D位置正好符合这个描述：它在两个储物柜之间，并且靠近医疗记录办公室。因此，正确答案是D。

items.title: Manager's Office
items.analysis: 文中提到“Manager's Office”在两个壁橱之间，而地图上唯一符合这个描述的位置是C。因此，第20题的正确答案是C。
